violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Service call placed. Sanitizer bay was set up to proper concentration using bottled chlorine sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Ambient temperature of the small refrigeration unit at the front counter was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Light cream observed with a temperature of 45 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods had just been moved to this unit this morning and were moved to properly functioning refrigeration unit. No TCS foods are to be placed in this unit until it maintains a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Space observed around the outer frame. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

Handle of the back reach-in was not in good repair. Tape observed holding the handle in place. Tape is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Handle is to be repaired using proper materials. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
The door to the customer restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

The ice machine and ice bin are lacking an air gaps. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
